questions.question: Vijay Shekhar Sharma and Salil Parekh are re-appointed as the MD and CEO of which two companies respectively?
questions.explanation: The founder and chief executive officer of financial technology company Paytm, has been reappointed as managing director (MD) and chief executive officer (CEO) of One 97 Communications, which operates under Paytm brand. Infosys has re-appointed Salil Parekh as the Managing director and CEO of the company for five years. Since 2018, Parekh has been leading Infosys, the country’s second- largest IT services firm.

questions.question: Which Indian state has joined the Global Network of Advanced Manufacturing Hubs (AMHUBs) of World Economic Forum (WEF)?
questions.explanation: Andhra Pradesh has joined the Global Network of Advanced Manufacturing Hubs (AMHUBs) of the World Economic Forum (WEF). On the sidelines of the annual Davos meeting of WEF, the state government and WEF exchanged the platform partnership on “Shaping the Future of Advanced Manufacturing and Value Chains”. Andhra Pradesh is the first state selected of Shaping the Future of Mobility and “Moving India” initiatives.

questions.question: Which grouping has launched a new initiative to boost flows of digital FDIs globally, along with WEF?
questions.explanation: The Digital Cooperation Organization (DCO) and the World Economic Forum (WEF) announced a new initiative to boost flows of digital foreign direct investments globally. Under the initiative, the DCO and WEF will launch Digital FDI Enabling Projects in countries around the world. DCO, which focuses on digital economy initiatives supporting youth, start-up entrepreneurs and women, has nine member states with a combined GDP of nearly USD 2 trillion.

questions.question: Which city launched the AI-based ‘Intelligent Solutions for Road Safety through Technology and Engineering’ (iRASTE) project?
questions.explanation: The project ‘Intelligent Solutions for Road Safety through Technology and Engineering’ (iRASTE) has been launched at Nagpur. It will identify potential accident-causing scenarios while driving a vehicle and alert drivers with the help of the Advance Driver Assistance System (ADAS). The project is undertaken by the I-Hub Foundation, IIIT Hyderabad, a Technology Innovation Hub (TIH). LaneRoadNet (LRNet), a framework with lane and road parameters has been designed to address problems of Indian roads, using deep learning.

questions.question: Sangeeta Sajith, who passed away recently, was associated with which profession?
questions.explanation: South Indian singer Sangeeta Sajith was a famous playback singer in Malayalam, Tamil, Telugu and Kannada languages. She has contributed more than 200 songs for the South Indian film industry. She was suffering from kidney related ailments for a long time. She died in Thiruvananthapuram.

questions.question: Recently the Government of India has withdrawn its proposal to sell its entire stake in which company?

options.label: A
options.text: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited

questions.explanation: The government had planned to sell its entire 52.98 per cent stake in Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) and had invited Expression of Interest (EoI) from bidders in March 2020.

questions.question: Which of the following is the focus country of the 17th Mumbai International Film Festival?
questions.explanation: The 17th edition of the Mumbai International Film Festival for Documentary, Short Fiction and Animation Films (MIFF-2022) is being held from May 29 to June 4, 2022 at Films Division Complex, Mumbai. Bangladesh is the ‘country of focus’ at the festival which will include documentaries, short stories and animation films from around the world.

questions.question: INS Gomti, which was recently decommissioned after 34 years of service to Indian armed forces, was a__?
questions.explanation: INS Gomti (a guided missile frigate) was decommissioned at sunset on 28 May 2022 at the Naval Dockyard in Mumbai after 34 years of service. INS Gomti takes its name from the vibrant river Gomti and was commissioned on 16 April 1988 by Defense Minister KC Pant at Mazagon Dock Limited, Bombay.

questions.question: In which state/UT, North India’s first Industrial Biotech Park inaugurated?
questions.explanation: Jammu and Kashmir (J&K) Lieutenant Governor, Manoj Sinha and Union minister Jitendra Singh inaugurated the north India’s first Industrial Biotech Park constructed at Ghatti near Kathua in the UT. The Biotech Park will act as hub for incubation of new ideas, to support the agri-entrepreneurs, startups, farmers, scientists and students. Under the new Industrial Development Scheme, Jammu and Kashmir was able to fetch investment of more than Rs 38,800 crore so far.

questions.question: Nechiphu Tunnel, which was seen in the news, is located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: The Border Roads Organisation (BRO) completed the final excavation work of Nechiphu Tunnel on the Tezpur-Tawang road in Arunachal Pradesh. Earlier, BRO completed the excavation of ‘Sela tunnel’ on the same route. Nechiphu Tunnel is at an altitude of 5,700 feet. The two tunnels will aid in deployind troops and weapons along the Line of Actual Control (LAC) with China.
